query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `tasks` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `title` VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  `description` TEXT,
  `assigned_to` INT,
  `related_property_id` INT,
  `related_contract_id` INT,
  `task_status` ENUM('pending','in_progress','completed','cancelled') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `task_priority` ENUM('low','medium','high','urgent') DEFAULT 'medium',
  `due_date` BIGINT,
  `completed_at` BIGINT,
  `created_by` INT,
  `created_at_tasks` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_tasks` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `property_documents` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `property_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  `pd_doc_type` ENUM('deed','license','insurance','inspection','other') DEFAULT 'other',
  `file_url` VARCHAR(1000),
  `file_key` VARCHAR(500),
  `expiry_date` BIGINT,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `uploaded_by` INT,
  `created_at_pd` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_pd` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `handover_records` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `unit_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `contract_id` INT,
  `hr_type` ENUM('move_in','move_out') NOT NULL,
  `handover_date` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `hr_condition` ENUM('excellent','good','fair','poor') DEFAULT 'good',
  `meter_reading` VARCHAR(100),
  `keys_received` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `notes` TEXT,
  `checklist` TEXT,
  `conducted_by` INT,
  `tenant_signature` TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at_hr` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_hr` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `compliance_records` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `property_id` INT,
  `cr_type` ENUM('fal_license','municipality','fire_safety','elevator','other') NOT NULL,
  `title` VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  `cr_status` ENUM('compliant','non_compliant','pending','expired') DEFAULT 'pending',
  `issue_date_cr` BIGINT,
  `expiry_date_cr` BIGINT,
  `document_url` VARCHAR(1000),
  `notes` TEXT,
  `created_by` INT,
  `created_at_cr` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_cr` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `vouchers` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `voucher_number` VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  `voucher_type` ENUM('receipt','payment') NOT NULL,
  `voucher_amount` DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL,
  `currency` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'SAR',
  `description` TEXT,
  `payer_name` VARCHAR(200),
  `payer_phone` VARCHAR(30),
  `receiver_name` VARCHAR(200),
  `voucher_payment_method` ENUM('cash','bank_transfer','check','online') DEFAULT 'cash',
  `bank_name` VARCHAR(200),
  `check_number` VARCHAR(100),
  `related_contract_id` INT,
  `related_payment_id` INT,
  `related_property_id` INT,
  `voucher_status` ENUM('draft','issued','cancelled') DEFAULT 'issued',
  `notes` TEXT,
  `created_by` INT,
  `issued_at` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `created_at_v` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_v` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `companies` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `name` VARCHAR(300) NOT NULL,
  `name_en` VARCHAR(300),
  `cr_number` VARCHAR(50),
  `vat_number` VARCHAR(50),
  `phone` VARCHAR(30),
  `email` VARCHAR(200),
  `address` TEXT,
  `city` VARCHAR(100),
  `country` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'SA',
  `logo_url` VARCHAR(1000),
  `website` VARCHAR(300),
  `company_status` ENUM('active','suspended','trial','cancelled') DEFAULT 'trial',
  `owner_id` INT,
  `created_at_co` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_co` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `plans` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `plan_name` VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  `plan_name_ar` VARCHAR(100),
  `plan_description` TEXT,
  `price_monthly` DECIMAL(10,2) NOT NULL,
  `price_yearly` DECIMAL(10,2),
  `plan_currency` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'SAR',
  `max_properties` INT DEFAULT 10,
  `max_units` INT DEFAULT 50,
  `max_users` INT DEFAULT 5,
  `features` TEXT,
  `is_active` TINYINT DEFAULT 1,
  `sort_order` INT DEFAULT 0,
  `created_at_pl` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_pl` BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `subscriptions` (
  `id` INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `company_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `plan_id` INT NOT NULL,
  `sub_status` ENUM('active','trialing','past_due','cancelled','expired') DEFAULT 'trialing',
  `start_date_sub` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `end_date_sub` BIGINT,
  `trial_end_date` BIGINT,
  `billing_cycle` ENUM('monthly','yearly') DEFAULT 'monthly',
  `sub_amount` DECIMAL(10,2),
  `sub_currency` VARCHAR(10) DEFAULT 'SAR',
  `cancelled_at` BIGINT,
  `cancel_reason` TEXT,
  `created_at_sub` BIGINT NOT NULL,
  `updated_at_sub` BIGINT NOT NULL
);
